forbidden_scope: Do not edit runtime source code from docs/verification context.
Do not re-read old sessions or full unrelated roadmaps.
Do not paste full test/build logs into board files.
known_evidence: Relevant docs are P8 progress and the existing-project-onboarding TODO ledger.
Verification should include focused tests, type-check/build when needed, line-count, diff check, conflict marker scan, and trailing whitespace scan.
needs_context_rule: Return needs_context if a verifier needs a command outside the listed project/package checks.
